ogTitle: Tresco West vs Truganina: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tresco West and Truganina.
heading: Tresco West vs Truganina — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tresco West, Victoria and Truganina, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Truganina has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Tresco West (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tresco West or Truganina safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tresco West has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Truganina scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tresco West scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Truganina scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tresco West or Truganina?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Truganina has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
